contexts.context: ...gifted dramatists of our own country, have been <mark>prone</mark> to select as subjects for their tragedies, events...
...classic prejudice (to which a good scholar is very <mark>prone</mark>) may be attributed the mention of the courtly...
...such timidity, without such irritability, without a <mark>proneness</mark> to exaggeration, the poetical temperament could not exist...
